top_findings.summary: The skill includes Jira Issue Lookup functionality that automatically fetches issue details from a specific external server (issues.redhat.com) without explicit user consent for network access or data transmission. While the skill's primary purpose is creating git commits, this external network request to a third-party server exposes potentially sensitive issue tracking data and is unrelated to the core commit creation task. Additionally, the skill automatically adds an "Assisted-by" footer disclosing AI usage without clear user opt-out, potentially revealing workflow information.
